metadata.description: The claude-code-harness kit — designs, bootstraps, audits, and extends a Claude Code harness (.claude/ + root CLAUDE.md), plus the devlog continuity companion. Opinion: under a capable model, less harness yields more productivity.

plugins.name: claude-code-harness
plugins.description: Designs, bootstraps, audits, and extends a Claude Code harness (.claude/ + root CLAUDE.md). Bootstrap / Audit / Extend / Explain modes + long-running build kit.

plugins.name: devlog
plugins.description: Records significant changes to .claude/devlog/ — the episodic 'what changed and why' continuity layer, one markdown entry per feature/fix/decision, with index+digest regeneration and a SessionStart digest that auto-surfaces recent devlog + active progress. The harness kit recommends this; installing it makes that guidance runnable.
